name: Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Cocoa; or 2 square chocolate bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cocoa (or chocolate) in a heavy pot.
2. Add Karo syrup, milk, vanilla, and butter to the sugar mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (235°F/112°C on a candy thermometer).
4. Remove from heat and stir in the melted butter and vanilla extract.
5. Allow the mixture to cool slightly until it is comfortable to handle.
6. Beat the mixture until it becomes creamy and smooth.
7. If desired, add chopped nuts before setting the fudge.
8. Pour the cooled mixture into a greased baking dish and let it set at room temperature.
9. Once set, cut the fudge into squares.
